articles.title: 2027년부터 EU에서 스마트폰 탈착식 배터리 의무화
articles.summary:
• 2027년 2월 18일부터 EU의 신규 스마트폰과 태블릿은 최종 사용자가 표준 공구로 배터리를 직접 분리·교체할 수 있도록 설계되어야 함
  • 새 모델은 드라이버 같은 표준 공구로 배터리 교체가 가능해야 하며, 열이나 용제가 필요한 접착제는 대부분 금지되고 특수 공구...

articles.title: 헬스장에서 낯선 사람에게 말 걸기

articles.title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy to raise up to $1.3B in IPO
articles.summary: Enhanced geothermal startup Fervo Energy’s IPO could value the company at up to $6.5 billion.

articles.title: US government warns of severe CopyFail bug affecting major versions of Linux
articles.summary: U.S. cybersecurity agency CISA says the CopyFail bug is being actively used in hacking campaigns, and poses a major risk to servers and data centers that rely on Linux.

articles.title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
articles.summary: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

articles.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
articles.summary: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.

articles.title: Katie Haun raises $1B for new venture funds
articles.summary: Katie Haun announced on Monday that $1 billion has been raised across new funds to continue the firm’s thesis of backing crypto and blockchain startups.
